title: CiReviewConfiguration
description: Drives the CI PR review orchestrator (Invoke-CiPrReview.ps1). Enforcement posture is a configuration setting, not hard-coded.

enforcementMode.description: advisory = comment + non-blocking vote, pipeline always exits 0. blocking = a finding at/above blockingSeverityThreshold fails the build and casts a reject vote.

reviewers.description: The diff-only trio. No GavinBrain dependency.

targetLanguages.description: Languages the reviewers should expect and apply rules for. Passed into each reviewer prompt.

postInlineComments.description: When true, each finding is posted as an Azure DevOps PR thread.

reconcilePriorBotThreads.description: When true, prior bot-authored threads tagged with botThreadMarker are resolved before posting a new round, preventing duplicate-comment spam on re-push.

botThreadMarker.description: Hidden marker prepended to bot threads so they can be reconciled across runs.

maxDiffBytes.description: Diffs larger than this are truncated before being handed to reviewers (cost/latency guard). Truncation is logged, never silent.
